final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 grid poster for a sleep-tips content series on Xiaohongshu.

Style/medium: needs a clean, premium, female-oriented wellness aesthetic with ins-style soft illustration — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a standard 3-column × 3-row grid layout with clear boundaries between all 9 cells, each cell centered and complete, no text near cut lines, visible spacing or thin borders between cells for clean slicing
Subject: must include soft sleep-related elements across cells: pillows, moon, stars, warm milk, aromatherapy, books, eye masks, curtains, bedding, phones, lamps, AC, coffee cups, notebooks, clocks, breathing visualization
Scene/backdrop: must be a cohesive cream-white, beige, oatmeal, light caramel base with warm brown text accents
Lighting/mood: needs a gentle, healing, sleep-therapy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel dominant with minimal dark brown text, warm and soothing direction
Materials/textures: needs a light skeuomorphic illustration treatment — exact grain and softness is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text exactly as specified:
Cell 1 (cover): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" (large title), "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" (subtitle)
Cell 2: "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" (title), "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" (body)
Cell 3: "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" (title), "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" (body)
Cell 4: "3. 房间温度别太高" (title), "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" (body)
Cell 5: "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" (title), "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" (body)
Cell 6: "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" (title), "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" (body)
Cell 7: "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" (title), "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" (body)
Cell 8: "7. 固定上床时间" (title), "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" (body)
Cell 9: "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" (title), "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" (body), "收藏这组，今晚试试看" (footer)
Constraints: must be 3×3 grid with 9 complete cells, each cell must work as standalone Xiaohongshu post after slicing, all text in Chinese only, no English, clean typography, magazine-quality layout, professional social media design aesthetic, no cheap marketing feel, no excessive decoration
Avoid: must avoid garbled text, English text, cheap marketing aesthetics, excessive ornamentation, text overlapping grid boundaries
